scope: Cycle 17: Re-fix BUGFIX-026 (C16 phantom push) + echo_memory LLM context + GM 3rd few-shot + bug hunt C16

bugs_found.description: Double reward application: StoreRun.handle_run_end() applies rewards via RESOLVE_CHOICE dispatch (store L322), then game_controller_effects.apply_run_rewards() was called AGAIN from controller L666. Player got 2x Anam, 2x total_runs, 2x run_history entries, 2x biome_runs, 2x echo_memory updates. Originally found in C16 but code changes were never pushed (phantom push — only status JSONs committed).
bugs_found.fix: Removed duplicate _effects.apply_run_rewards() call at L666. Rewards already applied and stored in ending['rewards'] by StoreRun.handle_run_end().

bugs_found.description: Phantom push pattern: C16 committed status JSONs claiming BUGFIX-026 and echo_memory features were done, but the actual code changes to merlin_game_controller.gd, merlin_llm_adapter.gd, and llm_adapter_prompts.gd were never pushed. Same pattern as C8 phantom push caught in C9. Root cause: MCP push_files was called for status files but not for code files, or code push failed silently.
bugs_found.fix: Re-implemented all C16 code changes in C17 and pushing code + status together.

overall_assessment: Cycle 17: Caught C16 phantom push (3rd occurrence after C8). Re-fixed BUGFIX-026 double-reward + re-wired echo_memory LLM context + added GM 3rd few-shot example. Bug hunt C16 on LLM adapter files: 0 critical/high bugs. 27 total bugs fixed across 17 cycles.
